April 23, 2026 |

Version 0.99.3

  • docs folder removed and website moved to https://synum-lab.github.io/PinPath-web/
  • DESCRIPTON file updated: R dependency version (>= 4.6.0) and lazyLoad field
  • Document and script added about how example data files were generated
  • Installation instructions updated in vignette and README


March 25, 2026 |

Version 0.99.2

  • Typos fixed in website
  • Documentation updated: indicate that usage of openFile is only available for Windows


March 24, 2026 |

Version 0.99.1

  • Default value of openFile set to FALSE
  • Documentation updated


March 12, 2026 |

Version 0.99.0

First release of PinPath.
